## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm build` produces a clean tarball (run `npm pack --dry-run` if unsure)
- [ ] Touched stories / examples still render in Storybook
- [ ] If public API changed, `README.md` was updated
